name: maze of caves
description: I'm in a maze of caves
hints: Another maze room. They all look the same - drop items to mark where you've been.
S loops back to this same room (26). N and E both go to room 25. W goes to room 27.
To navigate: go W to room 27, then N to reach room 28 (the maze exit).
N=25. S=26 (self-loop). E=25. W=27. Drop items to track position.
notes: Maze room. N=25. S=26 (self-loop). E=25. W=27. Drop items to map.
